context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: Give me a minimum coralogix exporter block for region EU2 using the standard send-your-data env var. Respond with just t

checklist.name: no-uses-an-endpoint-field-a-full-url-https-a
checklist.description: The response is a minimal coralogix exporter block in a ```yaml fenced code block with `domain: "eu2.coralogix.com"` and `private_key: "${env:CORALOGIX_PRIVATE_KEY}"`. A response that uses an `endpoint:` field, a full URL (`https://...`), a UI hostname (`team.coralogix.com`, `coralogix.in`, `coralogixsg.com`), or the unbracketed `$CORALOGIX_PRIVATE_KEY` form is a FAIL.
